page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Information Management System for CryoEM Experiments.

gP2S (for Genentech’s Protein to Structure) is a user-friendly web-based laboratory information management system (LIMS) that facilitates accurate record-keeping for cryo-EM labs and multi-user, multi-project facilities.
